metadata.briefing: Bitcoin has surged past $77, reaching new highs as geopolitical tensions ease with Iran's reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. Despite this bullish momentum, market sentiment remains cautious, with analysts highlighting ongoing fears and profit-taking that could dampen further gains. Looking ahead, investors should stay vigilant as macroeconomic factors and regulatory developments continue to influence the volatility of the crypto landscape.

news.title: Google now lets you explore the web side-by-side with AI Mode

summary.main: Now, when you're using AI Mode on Chrome desktop, clicking a link will open the web page side-by-side with AI Mode.

news.title: AI traffic to US retailers rose 393% in Q1, and it’s boosting their revenue too

summary.main: Adobe says AI traffic to U.S. retail sites also jumped 269% in March, with visitors converting better and generating more revenue than non-AI shoppers.

news.title: Google is now targeting bad ads over bad actors
